title: EP: Exact case password - MD5 hash computed correctly
test_steps:
Input password as 'Password123'.
Retrieve the computed MD5 hash.
Verify that hash matches the precomputed MD5 for 'Password123'.
expected_result: MD5 hash of 'Password123' is computed and matches the expected hash.

title: DT: Password provided - compute MD5 on exact string
test_steps:
Input password as 'TestCase1'.
Observe that MD5 hash is computed.
expected_result: System computes MD5 hash on 'TestCase1' and provides the hash.

title: State transition path 1 (ALL_TRANSITIONS)
expected_result: The MD5 hash is computed successfully and the returned value is a 32-character hexadecimal string matching the expected hash of the input password.
coverage_items: Idle--compute_hash/Compute MD5 hash on exact password string-->Idle
